meta.notes: SETUP: Set n8n variables SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON, SOCIAL_MEDIA_APP_URL, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. This workflow: (1) fetches brand profile + voice rules from Supabase, (2) fetches top competitor videos/hooks from social media app, (3) builds a Claude prompt that includes brand voice rules + competitor hook examples, (4) calls Claude to generate a channel-specific content brief, (5) saves to content_briefs table, (6) responds to app.js with the brief. Requires WF05 to have run first to populate competitor videos.
